Class Sort.TypedSort<T>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.domain.Sort
org.springframework.data.domain.Sort.TypedSort<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Iterable<Sort.Order>, Supplier<Stream<Sort.Order>>, Streamable<Sort.Order>
Enclosing class:
Sort
@Deprecated(since="4.1") public static class Sort.TypedSort<T> extends Sort
Deprecated.
since 4.1 in favor of Sort.by(org.springframework.data.core.TypedPropertyPath...)
Extension of Sort to use method handles to define properties to sort by.
Since:
2.2
Author:
Oliver Gierke
See Also:
